message:
Running command: 
MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
DESIGN="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

echo "=== Starting synthesis re-run from Yosys.Synthesis: $(date) ==="
cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN}"

# Run LibreLane from Yosys.Synthesis
# Use --last-run to reuse the existing wrapper_run tag
nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/apps/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --last-run \
  -F Yosys.Synthesis \
  config.json \
  > /tmp/librelane_synth.log 2>&1 &
LR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $LR_PID"
echo "Log: /tmp/librelane_synth.log"

# Wait and check
sleep 20
echo ""
echo "=== Initial state ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(librelane|yosys|openroad)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%"}'
tail -20 /tmp/librelane_synth.log
